name: Roasted Garlic Bread
recipeInstructions:
Place all ingredients except mashed roasted garlic in the bread machine in order of the manufacturer's instructions. Select the basic white cycle, medium or light crust. At the raisin/nut signal, add the roasted garlic. Do not use a delay cycle.
Roasted Garlic: Heat oven to 350°F. Carefully peel away the paper-like skin from around the garlic bulbs, leaving just enough to hold the bulb intact. Trim the tops of the garlic bulbs about 1/2 inch to expose the cloves. Place the bulbs, stem ends down, on a 12-inch square of aluminum foil. Drizzle each bulb with 2 teaspoons olive or vegetable oil. Wrap securely in foil; place in a pie plate or shallow baking pan. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes or until the garlic is tender when pierced with a toothpick or fork. Cool slightly. Gently squeeze the garlic out of the cloves.
Note: A 1-ounce bulb of garlic roasted equals about 1 tablespoon of mashed garlic.
